channel.title: Students on AI Tools & Tech Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Students on AI Tools & Tech Guides

item.title: Data Science Career Guide 2026: Skills, Salaries & Jobs for Students
item.description: Thinking about a data science career? This 2026 guide covers everything — skills, salaries, career paths, courses, and a semester-by-semester action plan for students.

item.title: How to Build a Data Science Portfolio as a Student (With 10 Project Ideas)
item.description: Want to land a data science internship? You need a portfolio. Here's how to build one as a student — with 10 project ideas, tools, and a step-by-step guide.

item.title: 15 Best Free AI Tools for College Students in 2026
item.description: Discover the 15 best free AI tools every college student needs in 2026. From writing and coding to research and productivity — all free or have generous free tiers.

item.title: 7 AI Tools That Actually Help You Study Smarter (Not Harder)
item.description: Stop studying harder. Start studying smarter. These 7 AI tools help college students learn faster, remember more, and waste less time — all for free.
